name: universal-brute-workpack
description: Universal Brute Workpack — a full-capability stdio-first Agent MCP workpack.
changelog: 0.1.0: stdio-first publishable MCP workpack with full admin default, optional profiles, doctor, and agent adapter.
changelogDetail: Adds neutral MCP tool names, stdio default for npx, SSE optional, in-process agent adapter, optional sidecar, .env loading, doctor, and smoke tests.
